title: Yasuie’s Execution Shakes Wano
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Toko, Momonosuke, Unknown person #13, Yasuie, Unknown person #14, Ebisu Town Citizens as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: Yasuie’s execution exposes Orochi’s cruelty and the tragedy of the SMILE victims in Ebisu Town.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Forgive your father for leaving you behind!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the lowlifies of ebisu! Drive them out of the capital!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: their sadness, their pain... they cannot show it on their faces!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of their expressions except their smiles have been stolen from them! They cannot but smile!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What the hell is so funny?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it's all the fault of Kaido and Orochi's

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 35 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
